items.title: Highlights of the Week and parish diary
items.summary: Weekly highlights, Lent and Holy Week notices, bishop visits, and practical parish updates are published on the highlights page and diary.

items.title: Parish newsletters and bulletin archive
items.summary: The newsletter page carries bulletin downloads and related parish documents, including synod material and newsletters.

items.title: Bidding Prayers and Penitential Rites
items.summary: The parish keeps a public archive of bidding prayers and penitential resources for communal and personal prayer.

items.title: Spiritual Reflection and Pope Francis' Words
items.summary: Regular spiritual reflection and Pope Francis commentary remain active parts of the parish website.
